+------------------------------------+
|                                    |
+--+-------+---------------+         |
|  |  Out  |               |         |
|  +-------+               |         |
|      ^                   |         |
+------+---------+         |         |
|      |         |         |         |
|      |         |         |         |
| +----+---+     |         |         |
| |  Node  |     |         |         |
| +--------+     |         |         |
|      ^  |      |         |         |
|      |  |      |         |         |
|  Deep          |         |         |
+----------------+         |         |
|         -+               |         |
|          |               |         |
|          |               |         |
|  Inner                   |         |
+--------------------------+         |
|          |                         |
|          |                         |
|          |                         |
|          |                         |
|          |                         |
|  Outer                             |
+------------------------------------+
       +--+-
   +---+--+
   |  In  |
   +------+
